title: Offender Registries/Community Notification - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Offender Registries/Community Notification 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MULTNOMAH COUNTY DEPARTMENT OF COMMUNITY JUSTICE SEX OFFENDER WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about certain high-risk sex offenders in Multnomah County, as designated by the State of Oregon. The site lists names, photographs, addresses, and other details for offenders on probation or post-prison supervision, along with their probation officer’s contact information. 421 SW 5th Avenue Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 988-3136 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE POLICE HEADQUARTERS SEX OFFENDER REGISTRATION UNIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Tracks people convicted of sex crimes who reside, work, or attend school in the state of Oregon. This list and the sex offender website include only those sex offenders designated under state law as predatory who have also been determined to present the highest risk of re-offending and to require the widest range of notification or found to be a sexually violent dangerous offender under state law. 3565 Trelstad Avenue SE Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 934-1258 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY DEPARTMENT OF COMMUNITY JUSTICE SEX OFFENDER WEBSITE OREGON STATE POLICE HEADQUARTERS SEX OFFENDER REGISTRATION UNIT
